category_sources: Official SRecord site describes file format flexibility and EPROM load-file manipulation documentation.
source_facts.description says it provides tools for manipulating EPROM load files.
display_name_sources: Official SRecord website title and documentation use SRecord.
docs_sources: Official SRecord Doxygen and manual pages are hosted under srecord.sourceforge.net.
Official SRecord website states complete project documentation and manual pages are available.
repo_sources: Official SRecord pages provide source release downloads and SourceForge project resources, but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official SRecord documentation covers load-file formats and conversion utilities.
source_facts.description says tools for manipulating EPROM load files.
source_facts.executables include srec_cat, srec_cmp, and srec_info.
